nasb.text: I am not doing this for your sake,” declares the Lord God, “let it be known to you. Be ashamed and confounded for your ways, O house of Israel!”

esv.text: It is not for your sake that I will act, declares the Lord God; let that be known to you. Be ashamed and confounded for your ways, O house of Israel.

cnv.text: 你們要知道我這樣行，不是為了你們的緣故；以色列家啊！你們要因自己的行為抱愧蒙羞。這是主耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 主耶和华说，你们应当知道，我这样做并不是为了你们。以色列人啊，你们应当为自己的行为抱愧蒙羞。’
